description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed collar and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not wring Do not bleach Do not scrub Dry flat in shade Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wash, dry and iron inside out Get into the investigative mode of weekend crime in this grey t-shirt from united colors of benetton. Team it with jeans and sports shoes or shorts and casual footwear for that varied look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
